case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CLAUDIA LORETO CARBAJAL CONTRERAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,460.80 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, CLAUDIA LORETO CARBAJAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, CLAUDIA LORETO CARBAJAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CLAUDA LORETO CARBAJAL CONTRERAS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
